topic: Inverse relationship (stopping distance vs sail width)
image_prompt: SVG scatter graph 'Stopping distance against sail width'. X-axis W / m from 0 to 0.2 (ticks 0, 0.05, 0.10, 0.15, 0.20), no minor gridlines; Y-axis Stopping distance / m from 0 to 25 (ticks 0,5,10,15,20,25). Smooth inverse-decay best-fit curve (d = k/W, k = 2.1) through teal × markers descending from (0.10, 21) to (0.19, 11). Domain stops at the data — does not extend to the origin.

SVG scatter graph 'Stopping distance against inverse of sail width squared'. X-axis W⁻² / m⁻² from 0 to 120 (ticks 0,20,40,60,80,100,120), no minor gridlines; Y-axis Stopping distance / m from 0 to 25 (ticks 0,5,10,15,20,25). Because the true relationship is d ∝ 1/W (not 1/W²), the plot against 1/W² is a concave-down rising curve (d = 2.1·√x), NOT a straight line through the origin. Teal × markers from (27.7, 11) to (100, 21); curve drawn only across the data domain 27.7 to 100.

SVG: two side-by-side space panels showing a small cool red dwarf star (orange-red, surface flares) and a very large hot blue hypergiant (blue-white with corona), labelled 'Red dwarf (cool)' and 'Blue hypergiant (hot)'.

topic: Binary star system with transiting exoplanet
image_prompt: SVG: binary star system on dark space background — a large hot blue star (left) and a small cool red star (right) orbiting a common centre of mass (yellow dot). Dashed elliptical orbital paths and dashed green habitable-zone rings around each star (the blue star's HZ is much farther out). A dark exoplanet transits in front of the blue star with a motion-arrow. Inset light-curve panel shows brightness-vs-time with a transit dip.

render_data.title: Ramp investigation — steel ball rolling onto a flat surface

image_prompt: SVG: ramp on a clamp stand sloping down to a flat bench. A steel ball (mass 0.30 kg) sits partway down the ramp; label 'Steel ball — 0.30 kg'. Ramp height marked 45 cm ('Ramp height / cm') and ramp length marked 80 cm ('Ramp length / cm'). A teal double-arrow below the flat surface shows 'distance rolled on flat'.

render_data.title: Dynamic trolley with rectangular sail — measure the stopping distance

image_prompt: SVG: 'Dynamic trolley experiment — rectangular sail' — wooden toy trolley with red wheels and a vertical RECTANGULAR dark-grey sail of width W mounted on a mast. Yellow double-arrow above the sail shows the width W. Ruler scale below labelled 0.0 to 25 m; 'Click to push down release mechanism' callout at the launcher.
